name: Demisas Dokum Emaye Mamulleri Sanayi Anonim Sirketi
summary: Demisas D√É¬∂k√É¬ºm Emaye Mam√É¬ºlleri Sanayi Anonim Sirketi manufactures and markets iron casting products in Turkey. Its products include brake disks and drums, flywheels and pressure plates, exhaust manifolds, involutes, brake and engine brackets, brake safety parts, wishbones, cell connector and supporting parts, compressor housings, pump housings, valve bodies, rail fastening components, scaffolding fittings, compressor parts, and other fittings, as well as machined parts. The company offers products for automotive, white goods, machine manufacturing, water systems, railway, hydraulic, and construction sectors. It also exports its products to France, Italy, Belgium, Romania, Poland, Tunisia, the Czech Republic, and internationally. The company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Kocaeli, Turkey.
